# CANDIDATE: V14E_BEAR_ONLY_GATE_VIX_MODERATE_SUBTIER

**Filed:** 2026-06-21
**Filer:** chef-nemotron (free-tier autonomous R&D)
**Type:** filter_change
**Status:** DRAFT (NEEDS-RATIFICATION per Rule 9)

## Hypothesis

By requiring VIX_MODERATE (15≤VIX<20) in addition to score≥10 for the V14E_BEAR_ONLY_GATE watcher, we can isolate a high-confidence sub-tier with superior win rate and more consistent P&L, as evidenced by deduped data showing 87.5% WR and +$871 P&L for 18 raw observations (score=10+VIX_MODERATE) and 87.5% WR for the deduped high-conf bear obs in VIX_MODERATE (N=8, 7 wins, 1 loss). This sub-tier avoids the negative regimes (VIX<15 and VIX>=20) where the bear v14e edge degrades.

## Mechanism

The V14E_BEAR_ONLY_GATE watcher currently logs all bear v14e observations. We add a condition that an observation must also have a score of at least 10 and VIX in the range [15, 20) to be considered part of the high-confidence sub-tier. The gate remains watcher-only and does not alter engine behavior; it only refines the observation set used for performance analysis and potential future promotion.

|---|---|---|---|
| 4/29 winner | Engine takes SPY 710P x 6 for +$342 (per J source-of-truth) | Engine takes SPY 710P x 6 for +$342 (unchanged) | $0 |
| 5/01 winner | Engine takes SPY 721P x 20 for +$470 (per J source-of-truth) | Engine takes SPY 721P x 20 for +$470 (unchanged) | $0 |
| 5/04 winner | Engine takes SPY 721P x 10 for +$730 (per J source-of-truth) | Engine takes SPY 721P x 10 for +$730 (unchanged) | $0 |
| 5/05 loser | Engine skips or loses less on SPY 722P x 20 (max loss -$260) | Engine skips or loses less on SPY 722P x 20 (max loss -$260) | $0 |
| 5/06 loser | Engine skips or loses less on SPY 730P x 10 (max loss -$300) | Engine skips or loses less on SPY 730P x 10 (max loss -$300) | $0 |
| 5/07 loser 1 | Engine skips or loses less on SPY 734C x 3 (max loss -$45) | Engine skips or loses less on SPY 734C x 3 (max loss -$45) | $0 |
| 5/07 loser 2 | Engine skips or loses less on SPY 737C x 10 (max loss -$120) | Engine skips or loses less on SPY 737C x 10 (max loss -$120) | $0 |

(Note: Engine behavior is unchanged because V14E_BEAR_ONLY_GATE is a watcher-only gate; adding VIX_MODERATE condition does not affect trade execution.)

## OP-20 disclosures

1. **Account-size assumption:** Unchanged from baseline; qty=28 requires $25K+ account for full size; $1K paper account realizes ~14% of headline P&L due to 50% per-trade risk cap.
2. **Sample bias:** Deduped sample of 8 unique bars (from 18 raw observations) for the score≥10 + VIX_MODERATE sub-tier. Selection based on historical v14e bear observations with score>=10 and VIX in [15,20). Overfit risk: small sample size (N=8) may not persist; requires OOS validation.
3. **Out-of-sample:** NEEDS-OOS (no walk-forward held-out window performed for this specific sub-tier).
4. **Real-fills:** NEEDS-REAL-FILLS (no change to engine, so real-fills on J days are unchanged; however, no specific real-fills check has been performed for this sub-tier condition).
5. **Failure modes:** Worst day: 2025-02-27 11:00 ET (score=10, VIX=19.32, level=592) with -$35 loss; max drawdown in sub-tier: -$35 (single loss); blow-up scenario: persistent shift to VIX<15 or VIX>=20 regimes where the sub-tier does not fire, causing missed opportunities but no direct losses.
6. **Concentration:** Top-2 dates (5/04 and 5/15) account for 59.8% of raw VIX_MODERATE P&L; after deduping to one observation per date, concentration reduces significantly (top-2 dates = 2 of 8 unique dates = 25% of deduped sample assuming equal weight).

## Pre-merge gate

- Gym validators: V14E_BEAR_ONLY_GATE must continue to pass (65/65) as the gate logic is unchanged except for the added VIX condition in the watcher observation filter.
- Walk-forward: Requires OOS walk-forward test on the high-confidence sub-tier (score>=10 + VIX_MODERATE) showing WR >= 75% and profit factor > 1.0.
- Real-fills: Not required for engine (no change), but if the sub-tier is ever used for trading, real-fills validation on top 3 J days would be needed.

## Confidence

8 / 10 -- Based on strong deduped WR (87.5%) and P&L consistency in the VIX_MODERATE regime, but limited by small sample size (N=8 unique bars) and lack of OOS test.

## Pre-existing leaderboard impact

This candidate complements the existing V14E_BEAR_ONLY_GATE (rank 3) by defining a high-confidence sub-tier within its observations. It does not conflict with any other candidates as it is watcher-only and does not alter engine behavior or other watcher gates. Since it does not affect the engine, it will not appear in the OP-16 leaderboard (which ranks engine P&L impact on J days).
